where_to_eat.name: U Prezidentů
where_to_eat.description: A local pub that requires cash only with staff who rarely speak English, preserving an authentic Czech drinking experience away from tourist areas.

where_to_eat.name: Prague Beer Halls
where_to_eat.description: Traditional Czech beer halls loved by travelers for their authentic atmosphere and local beer culture.

where_to_eat.name: Naplavka Riverside Bars
where_to_eat.description: Heated bars under the arches along the riverside offering cozy, lively atmosphere perfect for winter visits.

into_the_wild.name: Letná Park
into_the_wild.description: Wide, peaceful park with beautiful viewpoints that are especially stunning in winter light and uncrowded.

into_the_wild.name: River Vltava Riverside
into_the_wild.description: Beautiful riverside area perfect for observing local wildlife like nutrias and enjoying peaceful walks.

into_the_wild.name: Petřín
into_the_wild.description: Scenic area featuring blooming almond trees at sunset, ideal for afternoon walks and nature photography.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Prague at First Light (3:30-5am)
gram_worthy_spots.description: The city's peaceful early morning hours offer stunning photography opportunities without crowds, with beautiful light reflecting off architecture.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Charles Bridge at Sunrise
gram_worthy_spots.description: While crowded during the day, visiting at dawn captures the bridge's medieval beauty in serene conditions.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Old Town Streets at Sunset
gram_worthy_spots.description: Narrow cobblestone streets of Old Town display stunning colors and architecture, especially beautiful during golden hour.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Mála Strana Alleyways
gram_worthy_spots.description: Charming side streets in this historic district offer colorful medieval architecture perfect for street photography.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Žižkovský Vysílač (TV Tower)
gram_worthy_spots.description: Iconic Prague landmark that creates dramatic silhouettes and offers unique architectural photography opportunities.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Prague at 4-5am (After Night Shift Hours)
off_the_beaten_path.description: Late night/early morning Prague feels almost post-apocalyptic with just a few people, offering an incredibly peaceful local experience.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Vysehrad in Winter
off_the_beaten_path.description: Historic fortress area that remains completely empty even in peak winter season, offering solitude and beautiful moody atmosphere.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Side Streets of Mála Strana
off_the_beaten_path.description: Lesser-known alleyways in this historic district remain empty even when major tourist attractions like Charles Bridge are packed.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Národní Třída
off_the_beaten_path.description: Quieter neighborhood perfect for afternoon walks and street photography, away from the main tourist circuits.
